recentTweets.text:
I joined @Brett_Jensen to talk about the Title IX Supreme Court decision and more.

Listen to the full interview on my YouTube⬇️

https://t.co/Gm14oZnUZW

Tim Walz pardoned an illegal alien child rapist. Let that sink in for a second.

Thankfully we have a President & Administration who prioritizes American citizens. 

Great work, @SecRubio!

Calli Toler was only 6 years old.

She was killed by an illegal immigrant who had been deported THREE times before.

This tragedy should have never happened.

https://t.co/NBRrnFGR8B
RT @Brett_Jensen: Thanks to @RepMcDowell from District 6 for joining me tonight, as well as activist and new Mom’s For Liberty Chair Annett…

🚨NC-06 residents🚨 The USPS will be hosting a job fair in Greensboro on July 15th from 10 a.m. to 1 p.m.!

📍418 Gallimore Dairy Rd., Greensboro, NC

Register here ⬇️

https://t.co/sqPpo0TTgI

Americans deserve safe roads—not Democrats continuing to fight common sense CDL safety measures that put Americans first.

If a truck driver can’t read road signs, they shouldn’t be behind the wheel.

Trump's administration cleared a backlog of VA claims, bringing them down nearly 75% since the Biden administration.

THIS is veterans FIRST!

https://t.co/39uJMvKLzH
RT @JDVance: From day one, President Trump and I have said this very thing. Stopping the flood of illegal migrants into this country will b…

🚨NC-06 Students🚨Registration for the Congressional App Challenge is now open!

Submit your app by Oct. 26 for a chance to be featured on display in the U.S. Capitol building. More info⬇️

https://t.co/4tWpkfBHOA https://t.co/W7LmLd73ib
Let’s go USA 🦅🇺🇸
RT @DHSgov: Embrace the Homeland. Embrace Patriotism. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/wWOlz30iF2

I had a great evening at the @WhiteHouse Rose Garden last week celebrating America's 250th birthday!

Thank you @POTUS! https://t.co/cS8WQXBRSA

RT @Interior: Happy Independence Day, America! 🇺🇸

What a day to be an American. 250 years of the greatest nation on Earth. https://t.co/ow…
RT @WhiteHouse: Today, America wakes 250 years later as a beacon of hope, a republic entrusted to its people, an idea that changed the worl…

RT @USDA: From the heartland to every corner of this country, the @Freedom250 flag is flying high ❤️🤍💙

Here's to 250 more years of freedom…
RT @Freedom250: CELEBRATE THE 4TH OF JULY WITH US 🇺🇸🎉🦅https://t.co/ali1XLh2qG

Happy 250th birthday, America! 🦅

Today we celebrate our freedom, our history, and the greatest nation on Earth. Wishing everyone a safe and happy Fourth of July! https://t.co/yLROuRQvWT

As we celebrate America’s 250th Anniversary, we honor those who have defended our freedom throughout our nation’s history.

Always Above. The U.S. Space Force, our newest military branch, protects America’s freedom in space and reminds us that the sky is not the limit for https://t.co/ETjU7Vn8qW

As we celebrate Independence Day, remember North Carolina is expected to experience record heat this weekend.

Stay hydrated, check on family and friends, and have a plan to beat the heat. Have a safe and happy Fourth of July!

https://t.co/DLTFJI23H6

For 250 years, generations of brave men and women have fought to defend the God given freedoms we cherish.

Since becoming its own military branch in 1947, the U.S. Air Force has defended our nation from the skies, projecting American strength and protecting freedom at home and https://t.co/btrg8e07vc

The Great American State Fair is filled with amazing events celebrating our country's heritage.  

If you're in our nation's capital celebrating America's 250th birthday, be sure to stop by the National Mall and take part in this historic event for our semiquincentennial! https://t.co/OupxuDcTPl
https://t.co/XYTjWqiJID

As we celebrate America's 250th Anniversary, we remember the brave men and women who have defended our freedom for generations.

Always Courageous. Since 1775, the U.S. Navy has maintained our freedom at sea with honor, courage, and commitment. https://t.co/ol5JxTnNFK
RT @USMNT: BOYS ARE BUZZING. https://t.co/TcYacVeqXI
The world knows it's soccer. LET'S GO USA!

Across the Triad, communities and families are celebrating our nation's 250 years of history. 

As neighbors gather for parades, fireworks, and flags flying on Main Street, join me in celebrating the greatest nation in the world. Happy 250th, America! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/qEr4cjT2Ry
RT @WhiteHouse: "Today, we come to the heartland of America to pay tribute to a man who embodied the HEART, SOUL, FIGHT, and SPIRIT of our…
It's OK to love America. https://t.co/Xf1RiJXV1l
A job well done!👏👏👏

RT @JudiciaryGOP: 🚨NEW REPORT exposes South Korea's discriminatory attacks on American-owned businesses. 

Foreign governments are increasi…
RT @VP: Vice President Vance Delivers Remarks at Naval Air Station Oceana in Virginia Beach, VA https://t.co/aRK0iINhBO

As we celebrate America's 250th Anniversary, we remember the brave men and women who have defended our freedom for generations.
 
Always Ready. The U.S. Coast Guard has protected our shores since 1790, making it the nation's oldest continuous seagoing military service. https://t.co/U04lbKnnCU
RT @NASA: For 250 years, America has pushed the boundaries of what’s possible. From the invention of the airplane to the first steps on the…
I'm joining @edhenry at the top of the hour, be sure to tune in on @NEWSMAX ! https://t.co/11ftEC41u1

This We’ll Defend!

Older than the United States itself, the U.S. Army has fought for our freedom with courage and honor for over 251 years. https://t.co/hLXF0JQKdd

Massive victory for common sense and for generations of female athletes.

The Supreme Court's decision is about fairness. Title IX was created to protect women's sports, not undermine the women and girls who work tirelessly to train and compete in them.

RT @SteveScalise: 🚨 COMMON SENSE WINS.

The Supreme Court has made it CLEAR: Title IX allows separate women’s and men’s sports based on bio…

I introduced the Broadband Infrastructure Extension Act to give states and rural communities the time they need to complete broadband projects.

Arbitrary deadlines should not stand in the way of getting our communities brought up to speed.

https://t.co/tOIvlSjvhY

Tune in! I'll soon be speaking before the Rules Committee on two of my NDAA amendments.

One to crack down on foreign robocalls and another to stop drug cartels from importing illegal press machines used to manufacture deadly fentanyl.

Everyone has a motive. Mine comes from the loss of my brother.

Nine years ago today, I lost my little brother Luke to fentanyl  - and I’m in Congress, so you don’t have to lose yours. https://t.co/PC7TutjwFo

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
